title: Root `--continue` resumes the latest saved session
description: Black-box smoke for the root `armature -c` entrypoint using an isolated ARMATURE_HOME and a piped `/exit` shutdown.
input: Create a saved session, run `armature -c`, pipe `/exit`, and verify the CLI resumes the session and exits cleanly.
command:
bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; python3 - <<'"'"'PY'"'"'
import json, os, re, shutil, subprocess, tempfile
repo_root = os.environ.get("PROJECT_DIR") or os.getcwd()
tmp_home = tempfile.mkdtemp()
try:
    sessions_dir = os.path.join(tmp_home, ".armature", "sessions")
    os.makedirs(sessions_dir, exist_ok=True)
    session_path = os.path.join(sessions_dir, "2026-04-16T00-00-00-demo.json")
    with open(session_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
        json.dump({
            "provider": "openai",
            "model": "gpt-5.4",
            "history": [
                {"role": "system", "content": "sys"},
                {"role": "user", "content": "hello from session"},
                {"role": "assistant", "content": "session reply"}
            ],
            "stats": {"turns": 2, "inputTokens": 10, "outputTokens": 11},
            "savedAt": "2026-04-16T00:00:00.000Z"
        }, fh)
    env = {
        "PATH": os.environ["PATH"],
        "HOME": tmp_home,
        "ARMATURE_HOME": os.path.join(tmp_home, ".armature"),
        "ARMATURE_PROVIDER": "openai",
        "OPENAI_API_KEY": "test-openai-key",
        "ARMATURE_NO_INK": "1",
    }
    proc = subprocess.run(
        ["node", "dist/bin/armature.js", "-c"],
        cwd=repo_root,
        env=env,
        input="/exit\n",
        text=True,
        capture_output=True,
    )
    output = (proc.stdout or "") + (proc.stderr or "")
    output = re.sub(r"\x1b\[[0-9;?]*[A-Za-z]", "", output)
    print(output, end="")
    raise SystemExit(proc.returncode)
finally:
    shutil.rmtree(tmp_home, ignore_errors=True)
PY'
